upstream_note: v2: full 6x6. Top-level cells are the openai-egress row for v1 compatibility; the full grid is under upstreams.<egress>.cells keyed by ingress dialect.
capability_note: advisory context only (probe-first: every cell is probed regardless): Helicone AI Gateway has no OpenAI-Responses converter (endpoints/openai only ChatCompletions), no native Cohere dialect, and its Gemini egress targets Google's OpenAI-compat surface v1beta/openai/chat/completions rather than native generateContent (endpoints/google/generate_contents.rs); those cells are grey by that capability limit
